title: My Week - Pulse clicks direct to group, not just board
excerpt: It would be nice to be able to click a link to a group on a pulse in My Week and be directed to the board and group instead of just the board. Currently when clicking a link to a pulse on My Week the view is directed to …

posts.author: nicolaspratt (Nicolas Pratt)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to be able to click a link to a group on a pulse in My Week and be directed to the board and group instead of just the board. Currently when clicking a link to a pulse on My Week the view is directed to the board that pulse is on, but not a specific group the pulse is in.
